offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient document preparation causes compliance risks. We automate contract generation instead of manual document drafting and templates.
problem: Inefficient contract generation and compliance management.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try template library for standard contracts and editor
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
